objective: Build a new capability for Y-OS

execution_sequence.action: Prepare and plan: Build a new capability for Y-OS
Execute primary work: Build a new capability for Y-OS

delegation_plan: Mission classified as Development-heavy. Sequential delegation: agent--architect → agent--developer → agent--manus. PA validates final output before delivery.
review_requirements: All deliverables must match success criteria defined in Mission Pack
No Architecture Freeze v1 violations (9 core modules, no new modules)
escalation_conditions: Capability not found in Y-REG → Escalate to agent--strategist (Y-CAP gap analysis)
Agent fails step 3 times → Escalate to COO for workflow redesign
Module bypass attempt detected → Escalate to Human (Architecture Freeze violation)
expected_deliverables: Mission objective achieved: Build a new capability for Y-OS
Output matches expected format and quality
No unresolved blockers or open issues
